issues.originalText: To run Python code, you'll need Python 3.13+ installed
issues.description: Content recommends Python 3.13+ but version-manifest.json specifies Python 3.12 as target. Also mentions Python 3.14 features which are beyond course scope.
issues.webResearchNote: Per version-manifest.json (lastUpdated: 2026-02-04), Python course targets version 3.12 with note 'Minimum 3.12; content may reference 3.13+ features where noted'. The content should align with the 3.12 target or explicitly note when 3.13+ features are being used.

issues.originalText: Python 3.13+ recommended, 3.14 features noted where applicable
issues.description: Code example header mentions Python 3.13+ and 3.14, but course targets Python 3.12 per version manifest.
issues.webResearchNote: Course version-manifest.json specifies Python 3.12 as the baseline target. While mentioning newer versions is acceptable for awareness, the primary focus should align with the course's stated 3.12 target version.
